name: legalize-nl
description_en: Keeps the full, consolidated Dutch legislation as one Markdown file per law, updated on every real amendment.

name: Dutch-law MCP
description_en: Lets an AI assistant search wetten.overheid.nl statutes and provisions, with a paid gateway adding Rechtspraak rulings and Kamerstukken.

name: rechtspraak-js
description_en: Sanitizes and normalizes Dutch court-judgment data from Rechtspraak.nl's official open-data feed.

name: BSN validator
description_en: Validates and generates Dutch BSN (Burgerservicenummer) values.

name: Belastingzaken skills
description_en: Eight commands and eight skills for Dutch income tax, BTW, VPB, payroll tax, deductions, and objections — no filing, professional review required.

name: FALCON / nl-ai-lawyer
description_en: Lets an AI assistant advise on Dutch law — employment/CAO, AVG, tax, real estate, and immigration — via 14 skills and 7 specialist agents.

name: dutch-energy-regulation-mcp
description_en: Lets an AI assistant search Dutch energy-regulation records from ACM, TenneT, RVO, and SodM.
